content.claim: Hungary exhibits exceptionally high between-school variance: 71% of reading performance variation is attributable to school differences, compared to the OECD average of 36%; between-school variance is the third highest among all OECD countries
content.context: Fresh live research through the International comparison lens
limitations: Between-school variance reflects outcome of entire system, not solely early tracking
Cannot isolate tracking's contribution from school-choice effects or residential segregation
Does not establish whether variance reflects efficiency or equity trade-offs
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
